Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class OrderManagementSettings

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.MetadataForSettings
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.OrderManagementSettings
public class OrderManagementSettings extends MetadataForSettings

Java class for OrderManagementSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="OrderManagementSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}MetadataForSettings">
       <sequence>
         <element name="enableB2CIntegration" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableDuplicateManagement" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableHighScaleOrders" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableIndividualOrderItemTaxAdjustments" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableOMAutomation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enableOrderManagement" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="enablePersonAccountsForShoppers" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ingestOrdersAtScale" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="initOMAutomation" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="orgHasCommerceB2BPromotionsEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="repricingEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
